items.name: Wizards of the Astral Isles: Limb Stretching Spell
items.description: Use this ancient script to make your arms ridiculously long.  Then hit people with them!

items.name: Staff of Sparks
items.description: This staff shoots mini ball-lightnings.

items.name: Earth Protection Orb
items.description: Heal the world!  In ROBLOX - world heals you!  Well...it at least protects you!  This Earth orbits around you and shields you from nearby foes. Anyone who dares approach you will feel the burning wrath of core magma!

items.name: Protest Sign: Pro Fake Mustache
items.description: It's a reasonable position, I think.

items.name: Board With a Nail in It
items.description: Did they? That board with a nail in it may have defeated us. But the humans won't stop there. They'll make bigger boards and bigger nails, and soon, they will make a board with a nail so big, it will destroy them all!

items.name: Throwing Knife Pen
items.description: You look like you're about to sign this contract to give away the coveted magical super weapon, but no! You are a secret agent who has a knife disguised as a pen!  Click to remove the cap and then slash all the foes. Click and hold to charge the force of the throw when you release the knife from your hand. A hit will do 40 damage.  The secret weapon is safe... for now.

items.name: Trololo Cape of Invisibility
items.description: Now you see me - now you don't!  Turns yourself invisible and reappear as if out of thin air!

items.name: Hockey Stick
items.description: Shoot pucks at your foes and check them into submission.

items.name: Double-Bladed Scythe
items.description: Double your terror, double your fun. Click to attack. Anybody hit will take serious damage!

items.name: Transmorph Ray Gun
items.description: Morph other players into objects.  Guy spawnkilling you?  Turn him into a hat, or an apple, or some other crazy thing!

items.name: Korblox Sword and Shield
items.description: The Korblox both fight and defend with stony spikes.

items.name: Personal UFO
items.description: Drive your own personal UFO with up to 8 passengers! Use 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys to control the direction and 'Q' to raise the UFO, 'E' to lower it. Click and hold to suck up players beneath you into the ship and press 'T' while they are in the beam to teleport players into an open seat on your UFO. Use ' L' to control your sweet UFO lights.

items.name: Remote Explosive Detonator
items.description: Push the button!  Now!

items.name: Quick Potion
items.description: Zoom zoom!!!

items.name: Robo Arm Cannon
items.description: Sometimes, you just need a bigger boom.

items.name: Penguin Horde  Attack
items.description: Click to drop penguins who will attack your foes- doing 15 damage per hit.

items.name: First Aid Kit
items.description: Why aren't they just called aid kits? Or bandaid boxes?  Why the word first?

items.name: Neon Laser Launcher
items.description: There is no sound in space, but that doesn't mean colors can't be loud.

items.name: Donut Delivery Moped
items.description: This stylish pink delivery vehicle will take you anywhere you want to go.  Click to eat some of your donut inventory.

items.name: Attack Ocelot
items.description: "I've never seen an ocelot!" This ocelot companion follows you around and chases after enemies.
